description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Weekly Tests that runs every Sunday at 7AM UTC and can also be manually triggered. The workflow consists of multiple jobs: build-gem5 builds gem5 on a self-hosted Linux x64 environment, testlib-very-long-tests runs very-long tests for different test types, dramsys-tests runs DRAMSys checks, and weekly-tests is a dummy job that indicates the overall status of the weekly tests. Each job checks out the develop branch, and some jobs use containers with pre-installed dependencies. The workflow uploads artifacts, including the built gem5 and test results, and has a timeout of 3 days for long-running tests.
